title: HCSS Meeting - Portal Development Weekly Touchbase Microsoft Teams Meeting
raw_body:
Justin Harmon has shared notes from HCSS Meeting - Portal Development Weekly Touchbase Microsoft Teams Meeting, Nov 11 . The team discussed streamlining 100 tasks by identifying frequently used templates and tasks. Speaker 2 is working on compiling a list of tasks initiated in the last year to determine active templates. They noted redundancies, such as multiple tasks for the same action but with slight variations. The goal is to consolidate tasks into consistent templates to reduce redundancy and improve efficiency. Speaker 1 suggested focusing on template cleanup first as it would simplify task management and make it easier to identify and remove duplicates. They agreed that consolidating templates would be the quickest and most effective approach.

                                        <editable name="preheader">Justin Harmon has shared notes from HCSS Meeting - Portal Development Weekly Touchbase Microsoft Teams Meeting, Nov 11 . The team discussed streamlining 100 tasks by identifying frequently used templates and tasks. Speaker 2 is working on compiling a list of tasks initiated in the last year to determine active templates. They noted redundancies, such as multiple tasks for the same action but with slight variations. The goal is to consolidate tasks into consistent templates to reduce redundancy and improve efficiency. Speaker 1 suggested focusing on template cleanup first as it would simplify task management and make it easier to identify and remove duplicates. They agreed that consolidating templates would be the quickest and most effective approach.</editable>
